CustomField.description: HTML output template (with {{merge}} tokens) that mirrors the customer's provided report layout. When present, the branded PDF renders from this template instead of the default fixed layout. AI-drafted from the customer's document, then polished. Tokens: {{brand.logo}}, {{brand.headerText}}, {{report.formName|status|completedDate|workOrder|serviceSummary}}, {{answers}}, {{findings}}, {{signature}}, {{answer:Question Label}}. (Vignette 4)
CustomField.label: Output Template HTML
